name: Command A (03-2025)
tagline: 256K context, runs on two GPUs with ~150% the throughput of Command R+ 08-2024; strong on tool use, RAG, and agents across 23 languages.
metaDescription: Command A (03-2025) (Cohere), released 2025-03-13 — part of the Command A line. 256K context, runs on two GPUs with ~150% the throughput of Command R+ 08-2024;…
overview: Command A (03-2025) is a large language model from Cohere, part of the Command A line. Released 2025-03-13. Efficient enterprise workhorse for RAG, agents, and multilingual tool use.
What's notable in this version: 256K context, runs on two GPUs with ~150% the throughput of Command R+ 08-2024; strong on tool use, RAG, and agents across 23 languages.
